name: Fish Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Poach the fish in salted water for approximately 10 minutes until tender. Drain well and reserve a quarter pint of the fish stock for the sauce.
2. Melt the cooking fat and add the flour. Cook for one minute without browning.
3. Gradually add the milk, reserved fish stock, salt, and pepper to the melted fat mixture. Bring to a boil, stirring continuously until the mixture thickens.
4. Add the chopped eggs and parsley to the sauce.
5. Flake the fish and mix it with the sauce.
6. Place the fish and sauce mixture into an ovenproof dish.
7. Prepare mashed potatoes according to package instructions.
8. Spoon the mashed potatoes over the fish mixture.
9. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes in a moderate oven (350°F, gas mark 4).
10. Serve hot, accompanied by additional parsley sauce if desired.
